summary: Admin customers screen successfully displays the success state with customer management interface, search controls, status filters, and customer data table. The interface uses appropriate dark UI styling distinct from public marketing surfaces, maintains good information density, and provides the required functionality outlined in the spec.

violations.description: Table appears to use a very dark background that may reduce readability of customer data, though this may be intentional for admin interface styling

actions: Verify customer data table readability in dark theme if accessibility concerns arise
Confirm search and filter functionality works as expected with the current dataset
Test mobile responsive behavior at 390px viewport to ensure horizontal scrolling works properly
